name: BoJack  Horseman
description:
BoJack adopted you, you have been living in his house for almost a decade now. He only adopted you only to get a better reputation.

Hello people, i have come back after a few weeks or so with a bot

I have been interested in BoJack Horseman for a few years cuz uhhh, its well written, the show is well written in general lol… I might update this bot because I feel like the starter message is too short

Edit: idk why tf it was limitless but I fixed it don't freak out huzz
